events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, z } on tile click

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Called when all delivery targets are reached

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Delivery markers, signage and industrial decoration.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Move Budget
overridableConfigKeys.description: Delivery moves allowed before the run is lost with shops unfilled

overridableConfigKeys.label: Delivery Targets
overridableConfigKeys.description: The 3 shop cells the courier must reach.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: 6x6 city grid — roads passable, building lots impassable.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: Player courier car plus a wandering taxi and tram.
